heading: FOUNDATION SCHOOL FUND TRANSFERS

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: a school district having a wealth per student of less than one-half of the statewide average wealth per student
a school district having a wealth per student of at least one-half of the statewide average wealth per student but not more than the statewide average wealth per student
a school district having a wealth per student of more than the statewide average wealth per student
the taxable property values reported by the comptroller to the commissioner under Section 48.256 divided by the number of students in average daily attendance
